title: Mira and the Sky's First Dream
cover_prompt: A small girl with long, flowing hair stands on a hill at dusk, her hands cupped gently around a glowing spark. The ancient sky swirls with soft purples and blues, stars peeking through like distant eyes, while the moon watches warmly from above.
lyrics:
Long before you were born
The world was dark and deep
No whispers soft, no silver thread
No dreams to drift or creep

The stars all hummed a hollow tune
The moon just watched and sighed
Till ancient sky began to yawn
And stretched the night so wide

[chorus]
Oh, that was the first dream
A spark in endless blue
A breath of light, a fleeting sigh
The sky dreamed you

[verse]
Then came a girl named Mira bright
With hands so small and wise
She cupped the dark and caught the spark
That danced before her eyes

She blew it soft on evening’s breeze
And watched it float and gleam
The stars all leaned to see it glow
The first and sweetest dream

[chorus]
Oh, that was the first dream
A spark in endless blue
A breath of light, a fleeting sigh
The sky dreamed you

And it's still true tonight
style_prompt: Ancient storytelling lullaby, warm resonant female vocal, singing bowl and soft cello drone, 60 BPM, mythological, vast, reverent, timeless, the voice of someone very old and very kind, starts spacious and narrows to intimate, wonder without weight, low drone pad accompaniment

character.name: Mira
character.identity: A gentle girl who caught the very first dream in the palm of her hand
character.special: She carries the wonder of the night and shares its magic with the world

about: A curious lullaby about the origin of dreams, where the first spark of wonder was born in the ancient sky. The soft, rhythmic storytelling and gentle imagery help children drift into sleep, knowing the night still holds that same magic for them.
